deck_name: Prevention Practical 2 - Infection Transmission Prevention in Dental Medicine
deck_description: 51 concise flashcards from Prevention Practical 2 on infection transmission prevention in dental medicine, organized into five permanent stacks.

stacks.title: HIV, standard precautions, and PPE
stacks.description: Cards 01-10 from Prevention Practical 2: HIV transmission, standard precautions, gloves, masks, goggles, gowns, and PPE donning/removal.

stacks.title: Patient protection, hand hygiene, respiratory and waterline controls
stacks.description: Cards 11-20 from Prevention Practical 2: patient protection, hand hygiene, airborne/respiratory/TB prevention, dental unit waterline biofilms, and blood-borne disease risks.

stacks.title: Sharps, post-exposure care, instruments, and disinfection
stacks.description: Cards 21-30 from Prevention Practical 2: sharps safety, needle handling, post-exposure prophylaxis, reusable instrument processing, disinfection levels, surfaces, barriers, and operator-area preparation.

stacks.title: Dental office preparation and sterilization methods
stacks.description: Cards 31-40 from Prevention Practical 2: patient/procedure/end-of-day/weekly dental office preparation and moist heat, dry heat, cold chemical, vapor, and ethylene oxide sterilization.

stacks.title: Monitoring, handpieces, organization, zones, waste, equipment, and ergonomics
stacks.description: Cards 41-51 from Prevention Practical 2: sterilization monitoring, handpiece contamination control, four-handed dentistry, contamination zones, waste management, chair/unit selection, and posture.
